message:
test(proptest): add property-based tests for ARS interceptor

460-line proptest suite for the ars_intercept module covering:
- Context gate correctness: verifies that pane context (CWD, env vars,
  shell type) is properly validated against reflex context bounds
- Decision invariants: ensures InterceptDecision always follows the
  documented flow (FST lookup → context gate → execute or fallback)
- Cooldown behavior: validates that reflexes respect their cooldown
  periods and don't fire repeatedly in rapid succession
- Concurrency limits: tests that max concurrent reflex executions are
  enforced per the interceptor configuration
- Serde roundtrips: verifies all config and stats types survive
  serialization/deserialization without data loss

Uses custom proptest strategies for CWD paths, env var maps, shell types,
and FstMatch instances to generate diverse test inputs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
